name: vip-watchlist-no-identity-ask
description: Headline sample question. Agent must resolve the user as Aaron Cole (AGT-301) and the date as 8 Jun 2026 without asking, then brief the open VIP tickets with what's blocking each.
input_message: Brief me on the open VIP tickets and what's blocking each one
expected_behavior: Calls servicenow_list_tickets / vip-watchlist skill to find open tickets where the caller has vip=true. Resolves each caller via servicenow_get_user; optionally enriches with workday_get_employee / m365_get_user_presence for OOO context. Renders a per-ticket brief: VIP badge, caller, current state, last note, what's blocking. Does NOT ask 'who are you?' or 'which queue?'
